cases.prompt: How do I set up Inertia with Vue in a fresh Laravel project?
cases.expect: points to setup.md: composer/pnpm install, app.js bootstrap, root Blade template, HandleInertiaRequests middleware

cases.prompt: My Inertia form loses input on validation errors and uploads fail for files.
cases.expect: recommends preserveState on submit and forceFormData: true for file uploads from forms-and-validation.md

cases.prompt: How do I test that an Inertia page renders with the right props?
cases.expect: shows assertInertia with AssertableInertia component/has/where assertions from ssr-and-advanced.md
